## About this app

Arogya Sutra is an online platform for managing data associated with its tutoring classes in the most efficient and transparent manner. It is a user-friendly app with amazing features like online attendance, fees management, homework submission, detailed performance reports and much more- a perfect on- the- go solution for parents to know about their wards’ class details. It’s a great amalgamation of simple user interface design and exciting features; greatly loved by students, parents, and tutors.

Updated on

Feb 26, 2025

Education

results.content:
Matritva Care Matritva Care
Matritva Care Matritva Care

At Matritva, we celebrate the strength of motherhood by offering nutrition rooted in ancient Indian wisdom. Our products are thoughtfully crafted for every stage of motherhood, using recipes inspired by grandma’s kitchen. We blend tradition with Ayurveda to ensure purity, taste, and holistic care. With a focus on authenticity, we strive to nurture mothers with the best nature has to offer.

### Aarogya Sutra

Herbal blend with Amla, Shatavari & Dashmool—zero sugar, dairy or preservatives, crafted for women’s holistic wellness & nourishment.

### lactoshakti

Natural lactation with Shatavari, Jeevanti & Ajwain—no sugar, additives, crafted to support new moms' milk flow & daily wellness.

### Lactation Sonth Laddu [...] ## Customer reviews

Customer image

##### 

###### Images in this review

### Top reviews from India

##### A clean, comprehensive Ayurvedic superfood.

This is a thoughtfully crafted, 100% natural, herbal health drink designed specifically for women. It is a potent Ayurvedic superfood that supports postpartum recovery, energy, and immunity. Free from added sugar, preservatives, and dairy, it uses nutrient-rich ingredients like Amla, Shatavari, and Ashoka. The powder is safe, clean, and blends easily, making it a simple addition to a balanced wellness routine.
